message:
feat(web): add unified Skeleton component system

Implements phage_explorer-milk - foundational skeleton loader system
for showing premium loading states throughout the application.

## Base Component (Skeleton.tsx)
- Three variants: text, rect, circular
- Two animations: shimmer (premium), pulse
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion for accessibility
- Proper ARIA labels (aria-busy, aria-label, role="status")

## Composite Skeletons
- SequenceViewSkeleton: Sequence grid loading placeholder
- Model3DSkeleton: 3D viewport loading with center indicator
- PhageListItemSkeleton: List item placeholders with stagger
- GeneMapSkeleton: Gene annotation bar skeleton
- AnalysisPanelSkeleton: Analysis overlay loading
- SearchResultsSkeleton: Search results loading

## SkeletonContainer
Smart wrapper with:
- Configurable delay (prevents flash for fast loads)
- Minimum display duration
- Automatic state management

## CSS Animations (skeleton.css)
- Shimmer: Premium linear-gradient sweep animation
- Pulse: Subtle opacity fade animation
- Staggered child animations for lists
- Uses design system CSS custom properties

Unblocks: phage_explorer-7hlh, phage_explorer-pey4,
phage_explorer-8mek, phage_explorer-kin1, phage_explorer-mhua
